    capacity - Variable in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Room
     
    clearContractFields() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Clears all input fields in the contract form.
    clearFacultyField() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Clears the faculty name input field.
    clearInputFields() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Clears all input fields in the student form.
    clearRoomFields() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Clears all input fields in the room form.
    clearSearch() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Clears the student search filters and restores the full student list.
    Contract - Class in org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model
    Represents a contract for a student's accommodation in a room.
    Contract(int, Student, Room, LocalDate, LocalDate, String) - Constructor for class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Contract
    Constructs a new Contract with a specified ID (for existing contracts).
    Contract(Student, Room, LocalDate, LocalDate, String) - Constructor for class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Contract
    Constructs a new Contract without a specified ID (for new contracts).
